summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of landing page navigation and detail pages. Successfully tested all 7 homepage sections navigating to 24+ detail pages with React Router. All major functionality working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Step title 'Step 01: Upload Document' not displaying on process detail page
Revenue projection card text not found using text selector

passed_tests: Homepage loads with all 7 sections visible
Problem stat cards navigate to /problem/:slug correctly
Business model cards navigate to /business/:slug correctly
Target user items navigate to /users/:slug correctly
Back to Home button works on all detail pages
Detail pages show proper hero sections with data-testid attributes
Overview, key capabilities, stats, and tech stack sections display correctly
Explore More section shows related items and navigation works
Large stat numbers display correctly on problem and impact pages
Colored bullets display correctly on SWOT detail pages
Navbar links work for section scrolling on homepage
All data-testid attributes present for automated testing
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI text display issues on ProcessDetail and BusinessDetail pages - step title and revenue projection text selectors not working as expected. These are very low priority cosmetic issues.
